name: Gala Apples
description: Crisp and sweet Gala apples, perfect for snacking or baking.

name: Bananas

name: Strawberries
description: Fresh, sun-ripened strawberries bursting with natural sweetness.

name: Navel Oranges
description: Seedless navel oranges that are easy to peel and full of vitamin C.

name: Red Grapes
description: Plump, seedless red grapes with a rich, sweet flavor.

name: Broccoli
description: Fresh-cut broccoli crowns, tender and vibrant green, packed with nutrients.

name: Carrots
description: Organic whole carrots, sweet and crunchy — ideal for roasting or snacking.

name: Roma Tomatoes
description: Firm Roma tomatoes with low moisture content, perfect for sauces and salads.

description: Tender baby spinach leaves, pre-washed and ready to use in salads or sautés.

name: Yellow Onions
description: Pungent yellow onions that caramelize beautifully and add depth to any dish.

name: Russet Potatoes
description: Starchy russet potatoes, the classic choice for baking, mashing, or frying.

name: Whole Milk
description: Fresh whole milk from local farms, rich and creamy with full-bodied flavor.

name: Salted Butter
description: Creamy salted butter made from high-quality cream, great for baking and cooking.

name: Greek Yogurt
description: Thick, protein-rich plain Greek yogurt with a tangy, satisfying taste.

name: Sharp Cheddar Cheese
description: Aged sharp cheddar with a bold, nutty flavor perfect for snacking or melting.

name: Large Eggs
description: Grade A large eggs from cage-free hens — fresh, versatile, and nutritious.

description: Artisan sourdough loaf with a crisp crust and tangy, chewy interior.

description: Fluffy bakery-style muffins bursting with fresh blueberries in every bite.

name: Croissants
description: Buttery, flaky croissants baked fresh daily — perfect for breakfast or sandwiches.

name: Whole Wheat Bagels
description: Hearty whole wheat bagels with a chewy texture and subtle nutty flavor.

name: Cinnamon Rolls
description: Soft, pillowy cinnamon rolls swirled with sweet cinnamon and topped with glaze.

description: 100% pure-squeezed orange juice with no added sugar or preservatives.

name: Sparkling Water
description: Lightly carbonated sparkling water in assorted natural fruit flavors.

name: Cold Brew Coffee
description: Smooth, low-acid cold brew concentrate made from single-origin beans.

name: Green Tea
description: Premium Japanese green tea bags with a light, grassy aroma and clean finish.

name: Lemonade
description: Old-fashioned style lemonade made with real lemon juice — refreshingly tart and sweet.

description: Crispy, lightly salted corn tortilla chips ideal for dipping or snacking.

name: Mixed Nuts
description: Deluxe mixed nuts featuring cashews, almonds, pecans, and macadamia nuts.

name: Kettle Popcorn
description: Sweet and salty kettle-cooked popcorn with an irresistibly crunchy texture.
